description: Enjoy the chilly evenings in style this season with this knit muffler from Reid and Taylor. Drape it over your kurta or knot it over your T-shirt and enjoy that hot street food in cozy comfort.Length: 160 cmWidth: 31 cmMade of lamb's wool to offer snug warmthHound's tooth pattern with tassels for styleWash careDry clean recommendedHand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryDry flat in shadeCool iron
